materialChanges: Revised the Form B Wing-4 evidence-contribution item to state random assignment to a target-specific expression-reduction procedure or matched control, complete follow-up, and the causal boundary used by its keyed answer and reasoning.
Reframed the organismal evidence contribution as testing a phenotype in intact biological context and supporting a bounded effect only when an assigned change warrants that inference.
Replaced curriculum-administration phrasing in prerequisite feedback and made the prose route through the evidence-integration sequence read naturally without depending on the diagram.

reviewDispositions.rationale: assessment.json#item-b-evidence-contribution now tells the learner that otherwise comparable insects were randomly assigned to a target-specific Wing-4 reduction procedure or matched control and that follow-up was complete. The reasoning now ties the bounded causal contribution to those disclosed design features, leaving mechanism and population generality open.

The organismal row in content/020-concept.md no longer says that organismal evidence shows the mechanism operating. It now says that the line tests a phenotype in intact biological context and can support a bounded effect at that scale when paired with an assigned change.

This note confirms the worked example's line-specific survival, pooled survival, inhibitor comparison, extreme missing-outcome bounds, and explicitly assumption-dependent interval. Independent inspection found those values and their stated design limitations internally consistent, so the final lesson preserves them.
The finding records that the concrete Tide-1 opening passes the first-read gate. The opening case, question, motivation, and bounded central move remain unchanged.

The prerequisite feedback now tells learners that they used the association-causation distinction and model-limits reasoning needed for the lesson, removing the course-administration phrase that they had 'activated' named prerequisites.

The sentence about a nonvisual or print route was replaced by a direct invitation to follow the same evidence-integration sequence without the picture. The nearby table, ordered prose, diagram alt text, and long description retain equivalent access.

The finding affirms that the worked Tide-1 example exposes translation, quality auditing, dependence mapping, independent checks, and calibrated claim construction. Those elements remain intact after the final revision.

The finding affirms that both misconception blocks perform elicitation, neutral statement, disconfirmation, repair, comparison, and recheck. The final revision does not alter those successful sequences.

The finding affirms that the Harbor-7 task requires model selection, conflict diagnosis, calibrated integration, and a discriminating design in a genuinely changed context. The task and its bounded feedback remain unchanged.

evidenceChecked: All seven scene files retain one level-one heading, semantic source order, ordinary text prompts before feedback, and no raw HTML, script, remote embed, pointer-only action, timed requirement, or fixed-layout dependency.

The evidence-integration diagram has concise alt text, an outcome-equivalent long description, valid labelled nodes and edges, and nearby table and ordered-prose routes that do not depend on colour or position.

The synthesis scene explicitly preserves keyboard, screen-reader, narrow-screen, 200% zoom/reflow, print, reduced-motion, typing, dictation, list-based dependence mapping, and nonphysical supplied-data routes without changing the learning operation.

Assessment remains untimed and retakeable, uses semantic text response modes, maps every item to a scene, objective, outcome, and rubric, and requires no personal, clinical, image-upload, audio, field, or laboratory participation.

Every scientific case and datum is marked fictional; the pack contains no personal or patient data, executable content, unsafe active media, external asset, secret, physical experimentation instruction, diagnosis, treatment, ingestion, or unsupervised collection route.
lesson.json declares no third-party assets; the local inert diagram is identified in ATTRIBUTION.md as original CC BY 4.0 course material with a textual equivalent.

All four reference records declare factual-reference use, facts-only-original-expression, displayed licence or rights context, concrete rights evidence, dated agent-access terms checks, and no human-only source; ATTRIBUTION.md records original synthesis and no copied source expression, media, data, tables, or questions.

Authors, material authoring agents, accountable principal, review runs, conflicts, source-access boundary, and this fresh finalizer run are disclosed in pack artifacts; the finalizer run ID appears in no authoring or review provenance.
limitations: This pack-local source audit did not operate a live screen reader, browser keyboard path, 200% zoom/reflow renderer, print export, or unavailable non-web export adapter.

The finalizer did not re-fetch external source or terms pages under the pack-local scope; rights and access conclusions rely on the dated reference ledger, attribution record, and the academic review's direct source checks.
The operator prohibited npm, so canonical source preflight and repository validation remain to be run after the real final content commit is substituted.

rationale: The two counted advisory inputs match PREM-SCI-011 version 0.1.1 and original candidate a34e73a7f6719d80c2988ebe5bf38aac6ae4adcc, supply the required academic and learning-design roles, use two distinct attested run IDs and declared model families/providers, and have one approval plus one request-changes verdict. Their COMMENTED GitHub transport and non-dismissed state are taken from the accountable operator's supplied record; the snapshot does not prove independent human or provider verification. Two other pack reviews were excluded because they target version 0.1.0 and candidate 90d764925745ea1a3b5bea3ac6e58666653a27f6. The academic review's causal-assessment and organismal-overstatement findings were incorporated, its quantitative note was independently checked and retained, and every learning-design note was either incorporated or preserved with an indexed rationale. The resulting lesson keeps a coherent bounded evidence-integration model, accurate answer logic, same-scene claim/source coverage, faded practice, transfer, recovery, and accessible equivalents. The finalizer's source-level accessibility-and-rights audit is satisfied with the declared live-testing, external-recheck, and validation limitations. Scoped JSON parsing, identity and cross-file mapping checks, scene heading checks, claim-to-source-note coverage, diagram endpoint checks, and whitespace checks passed. On that evidence the lesson is suitable for merge once the operator records the actual final content commit and completes the explicitly reserved validation and publication steps.
dissent: The academic advisory input remains a request-changes verdict rather than an approval; its two actionable concerns were accepted and resolved in this single final revision, while its quantitative note required no change.

Both reviewers disclose that github:VSBDev is also the accountable authoring and operating principal. The distinct run IDs, providers, models, and COMMENTED transports are attested provenance, not verified independent human peer review.
conditions: Replace PENDING-FINAL-COMMIT with the actual 40-character SHA of the operator-created final content commit containing both eligible reviews and this revision, without changing teaching content after that commit.
After substituting the real final commit, run the canonical strict source preflight and repository verification required by project governance; do not merge if either fails.
If the merge proceeds, the maintainer may make only the reserved publication transition to lesson status, source confidence, and retained claim review-status fields.
